nasb.text: And as he heard these words, Ananias fell down and breathed his last; and great fear came over all who heard of it.

esv.text: When Ananias heard these words, he fell down and breathed his last. And great fear came upon all who heard of it.

cnv.text: 亞拿尼亞一聽見這話，就仆倒斷了氣。所有聽見的人都十分害怕。

ccb.text: 亚拿尼亚听见这话，当场倒地而死。听见这件事的人都非常惧怕。

csbs.text: 阿纳尼亚听见这话，就仆倒断了气；所有听到这事的人都大为恐惧。
